def positive_side_effect_comprehension():
    rule_id = "side_effect_comprehension"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "List, set, or dicit comprehensions used as standalone statements where the result is discarded."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
